message:
feat(freeze): Add get_var/get_var_undef opcodes Zig support

Convert get_var and get_var_undef opcodes to support both C and Zig output.
These opcodes look up global variables by name.

Stack effect: [] -> [value] (pushes 1)

Implementation:
- Gets global object
- Gets property by string name from atom
- Frees global object
- For get_var: checks for exception and returns if error
- For get_var_undef: allows undefined (no exception check)
- Pushes value to stack
- Handles empty/out-of-bounds atoms by pushing UNDEFINED
- Special case: if self-recursive, sets pending_self_call flag
- In Zig: returns directly on exception
- In C: uses next_block = -1 and break
